articles.title: Polygon Rolls Out Zero-Knowledge, Privacy-Enhanced Identification Product
articles.description: Under the design for Polygon ID, a bar owner could theoretically use the credential-verification system to verify that a patron is of age, without ever having to look at any identification card.

articles.title: Polygon launches web3 identification service using zero-knowledge proofs
articles.description: The team said that its ID solution will be useful for blockchain-related Know Your Customer (KYC) checks without revealing personal data.

articles.title: Coinbase CEO Armstrong: We Delisted BUSD Due to Liquidity Concerns
articles.description: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong said the exchange decided to suspend trading of Binance USD (BUSD) because the company had concerns about its liquidity.

articles.title: Chainlink introduces new developer platform called Functions
articles.description: Decentralized oracle network Chainlink has launched a new developer platform called Functions, aiming to foster interactions between traditional and web3 apps.

articles.title: Safe launches new development stack called ‘Core’ with Stripe and Gelato
articles.description: Safe launched Core, an open-source stack that integrates account abstraction to simplify smart contract development on the Ethereum blockchain.

articles.title: Litecoin ranks among most popular cryptocurrencies for online shopping in 2022 – CoinGate report
articles.description: Litecoin (LTC) is emerging among the most preferred cryptocurrencies for use in online shopping as digital assets get entrenched in … Continued

articles.title: Solana proposes network upgrade changes following recent outage
articles.description: Solana co-founder Anatoly Yakovenko said plans are in place to improve network reliability.

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin Explains How Ethereum Could Improve User Experience
articles.description: A better way to handle fees and transactions are some of the issues that Ethereum needs to tackle before reaching mass adoption.

articles.title: Solana plans to improve its blockchain: Here’s how
articles.description: After a network-wide slowdown left users frantic, Solana released plans to improve its latest network upgrade.

articles.title: Conflux raises $10 million from DWF Labs in token round
articles.description: Conflux, a Layer 1 blockchain developer, raised $10 million from DWF Labs in token round.

articles.title: Dogecoin (DOGE) to Start Trading on This Major Exchange
articles.description: Philippines-based cryptocurrency exchange Coins Pro has added Dogecoin (DOGE) to its list of its crypto-to-fiat trading pairs

articles.title: Cardano-Based SingularityNET ($AGIX) Maintains 1,000% Rally as Elon Musk Works on New AI Research Lab
articles.description: Cardano-based artificial intelligence marketplace SingularityNET (AGIX) has seen its price rise by 11% in the last 24 hours, making it today’s top performer in the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market cap. The sudden rally started shortly after rumors surfaced that Elon Musk wants to build a ChatGPT competitor. As the 4-hour chart below shows, AGIX […]

articles.title: Playboy's Next Step in Web3: MetaMansion in The Sandbox
articles.description: Playboy's Web3 lead Liz Suman sat down with Decrypt's Dan Roberts at NFT Paris to tell the story of how the 70-year-old magazine brand got into Web3 and preview its upcoming MetaMansion in The Sandbox, which will give special access privileges to those with a Playboy Rabbitar NFT.
